reviews.review_description:
What a lovely game and experience this is. It's very mindful and relaxing experience. It's sad to see bad reviews from people who clearly don't understand what this game is about in the first place.

Yes, some of graphics are still a bit basic and I hope the developers will keep further improving and developing this beautiful game. I can see a lot of ways for this game to expand on the future (eg walking around, different geographies and birds etc). Big thumbs up from me 👍🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for leaving such a kind review! We're so glad you're enjoying your time in the forest <3 We look forward to making the game even cozier in future updates!

reviews.review_description: This is a relaxing game where you play as a birdwatcher, observing birds in a cozy forest. As you progress, you unlock more birds and gear, which keeps things fresh and rewarding. The daily photo challenges give me a great reason to keep coming back. It’s a thoughtfully designed free-to-play game with no content locked behind a paywall.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your kind review! We're really glad to have gotten the Trail Pass system into the game, like you said really helps to make coming back throughout the week feel meaningful <3

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game, I haven’t seen one like it. The concept is amazing, so simple but addictive. 

Just a few things, I’ve only been on it once and I’m sure the developers will be adding to it in time.  I did feel a little claustrophobic not being able to move or even turn around, even if you could just move and look around in that little area.  I play seated so it’s difficult / uncomfortable for me to spin my head all the time.

It would be amazing if you could walk around the park further, little benches to sit on, other items to find and collect, rainbow bottle caps when you get certain rare birds etc but l do love this game and the idea, well done.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind review! We really enjoy playing seated in office chairs (if you have one!) as that way you can still be nice and comfy, but swivel all the way around to look behind you :) And thanks for the feedback on being able to walk around, I'll pass that along to the team!

reviews.review_description:
This is like a one to one remake of pokemon with birds and its so addicing

but there should be a way to get Rainbow bottle caps without spending money

developer_response.body: Yay! We're so glad you got the inspiration from Pokemon Snap, we're really proud of how it's come together <3 And thank you for the feedback on Rainbow Bottlecaps, I'll pass that along to the team. We tried our best to make sure as a free-to-play game that the premium items don't feel like pay-to-win, but always happy to hear ways to make the game as fun as possible for our players!

reviews.review_description:
The overall art direction is nice but the graphics look really dated with muddy textures reminiscent of early Quest 1 games.

The birds are cute but they're not well animated. They fly like little robots and will often skim along the ground like a hovercraft which looks really odd. 

I was bored in minutes.

Yeah it's "free" but add in the DLC and you're paying a premium price for a bland and dated looking game.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thanks for your feedback, we appreciate you giving Birdseed a shot. We’ll continue to improve the game and quality of life as we roll out updates.

reviews.review_description: Im an avid bird watcher and photographer this is great for kids to learn about birds.  They only thing I wish you could move around and I seem to see the same birds. I have all the bird packs and have yet to see a raptor? Otherwise nice concept 👌

developer_response.body:
So glad you're enjoying it! And yes we do need to make some adjustments to the rarity system, we'll update our comment here once that patch has been sent through :) Thanks again for playing!

Update: We've just a pushed a patch that should fix some issues around Field Guide's not unlocking properly! Let us know if you're still having any issues :)

reviews.review_description: I love the concept and gameplay was fun first playthrough actually excited to get a picture of a bird flying by, I'd love to be able to walk around more though and seek the birds out

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks so much for your kind words and I'll make sure to pass on your feedback on walking around for sure. We did find it difficult to balance the want to make it cozy (i.e no motion sickness, completely seated) and the very real want to explore the area around you. We'll continue to explore ways to make that happen though!

reviews.review_description:
Love this little game. Still early days and can’t wait to see it grow!
Oh and I’ve had no bugs so far!

developer_response.body: So glad you've been enjoying it! We hope you enjoy your time in the forest <3

reviews.review_description: I really like taking photos of birds irl, really enjoyed the experience here :)

developer_response.body: So glad you're enjoying it! Thanks so much for your kind words <3

reviews.review_title: It looks fun but I can't play
reviews.review_description: So I want a new game I went to get this one it looked fun and cute but when I went to play it my screen kept glitching it went to the game to black and over and over🙄 it took forever😭 to leave the game so do not get it does not work.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks so much for leaving your feedback. We've pushed an update just now that should solve your issues. If you could let me know what headset you were playing on when you saw the bug and if you'd played in previous versions, that would be very helpful for us for future updates! Either by updating your review here, messaging us in Discord (buffalobuffalo.ca/discord) or emailing us at contact@buffalobuffalo.ca :)

reviews.review_description: Protect your children from such stupid games.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review. We'd love to know more about your feedback on the premium store. We wanted to ensure that all premium items are completely optional, so that players can enjoy the full gameplay experience completely for free. If you have any concerns to the types of items in the store, however, we'd love to hear more to improve the game and make sure it's the best experience for all our players!

reviews.review_description: It's cute, fun, and relaxing. I'm excited for the update to release more features! I haven't noticed any glitches

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your kind words! So glad you're enjoying your time in the forest <3

reviews.review_description: It looks like a great game, the reviews are great, but whenever I launch the app my screen just begins flashing black and the lobby, I cannot open my meta menu and all I can do is restart my headset when this happens, does anyone know what this is? Edit: Hello Devs, the new update did not fix the game, it still glitches. Once I get on the game it does the regular meta loading screen than it swaps the the title screen, once this happens, my screen will flash black and the title rapidly, at least twice a second, I can interact with the title, but whenever I close the “hold to start” whenever it flashes it will reset the bar, making it where I cannot play the game, not leave it, as the meta button doesn’t work. Edit 2: hello devs and others who are reading this, if the update did not fix your problem of crashing and or lagging whenever you join, uninstalling and reinstalling the game fixed he problem for me.

developer_response.body: Hi CookieJar! Glad to hear your issues were resolved and thank you so much for updating your review with more information, this really helped us tackle the issues for future updates. Happy birding!

reviews.review_description: I get into the game, and it tells me to hold the trigger to start. Nothing happens!!! I tried quitting the game and reloading it, but the same thing happens. There’s no way I can’t even play this game.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks so much for reporting your bug. We have a Post up on our store page explaining how to refresh your save file in Settings that might help. Feel free to reach out to us on Discord or at contact@buffalobuffalo.ca if you need more direct support and this solution doesn't resolve the issue. Hopefully we can get you back into the game soon!

reviews.review_description: So what's been happening is I go in the game but I can't do my daily quest and the only bird I can see is bluejays and I can't do multiplayer cab someone help me out

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks so much for reporting this - to help you best it would be great if you could join our Discord (buffalobuffalo.ca/discord), so we can get more information on your save file to address the bug. Or if you'd rather email, you can reach out to us at contact@buffalobuffalo.ca.

reviews.review_description: Absolutely love the art and concept of the game! After realizing that I was stuck in place.. I enjoyed taking pictures for a few until I ran out of pictures for the day?! I would love a small trail to walk along? Maybe a map selection of some kind? Also the 12 picture limit left me disappointed and just wanting to enjoy the game more.. Beautiful environment though 😍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Lexi! We totally hear you on the environment, we'd love to add more spaces to explore as well - maybe if we get some more funding in the future :)

reviews.review_description:
Update: it got fixed and is a great and real cozy nice game that captures the beating nature.

 The game looks amazing from the beginning but when I go to enter and hold the trigger down to start it freezes and stays frozen

developer_response.body: Hi Recon! Glad that your issue was resolved, and thank you so much for your kind words <3 Happy birding!

reviews.review_description: Lovely little game, it’s come leaps and bounds for when I first got it. The folder has definitely improved recently. I love the birds that have been seen recently part. Looking forward to seeing what multiplayer has to offer. my son loves how cute the birds are, but doesn’t to play by himself. Hoping they get that up and running soon.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're so glad you've been enjoying the updates, let us know if you've gotten a chance to try the new multiplayer update. Excited to hear your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Game freezes every time I hold the trigger to start. I just downloaded this game and have been unable to play which is very disappointing, and I hope someone can contact me to help fix this problem please.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks again for your patience as we worked on solving this issue. Just wanted to check in and see if you're still having issues on launch? We have instructions in our latest Meta post that explains how to fix it if you're still having problems!

reviews.review_description: this game can be fun in all but it is so slow. like this game is so slow all you do is just take pictures of birds like it might be peaceful and stuff but for the people who want action this game sucks.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! Completely understand your point of view, and appreciate you giving Birdseed a shot :) We have some more challenges and weekly progression mechanics coming for full release, which we're hoping we'll keep things exciting (but still cozy!) as players get deeper into the game

reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying this app. It is quite like real bird watching, all about being somewhere beautiful and waiting quietly to see what turns up and then trying to get a decent photograph of it. It is a nice place to be.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks so much for your kind words, so glad you've been having fun experiencing the lovely hobby of birding. Hope you've had a chance to check out our recent updates, we've added tons of new birds for you to discover!

reviews.review_description: Fun relaxing game but advertised multiplayer when multiplayer is not out yet.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thanks so much for your feedback. As this is an Early Access title, not all features are out quite yet - but multiplayer should be with you soon! Keep an eye on our announcements in the next couple weeks :)

Update: Just wanted to edit my comment to let you know that multiplayer is now out! Let us know what you think when you get a chance to play!

reviews.review_description: when i hold down the trigger to start the game it just freezes, im on meta quest 3s, please fix this...

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks again for your patience as we worked on solving this issue. Just wanted to check in and see if you're still having issues on launch? We suggest following the instructions on our latest post if you are!

reviews.review_description: I would give it 5 stars only if i could take more than 10 pictures a day

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your kind words and feedback! We can confirm we're looking at ways for players to get access to more film canisters for 1.0 release, so keep your eyes pealed <3 Happy birding!

reviews.review_description: It is still glitching after update

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks again so much for reporting your issue. Just checking in to see if you're still having issues since the last update? We've posted a guide on how to fix it on our store page if you're still having any problems!

reviews.review_description: I had a lot of fun with this game just taking photos of birds

developer_response.body: So glad you've been enjoying your time in Birdseed! Thanks so much for taking time to leave a review as well, it means the world to us <3
